caption: Two men are seated in a room, positioned in front of a screen displaying a video. The man on the left has graying hair and wears a dark green t-shirt, while the man on the right has red hair and a beard, wearing a gray t-shirt and a necklace. Behind them is a shelf of media cases and a glowing neon sign that reads "OUR STUPID REACTIONS". The men maintain serious, contemplative expressions throughout the sequence, with the man on the right resting his chin on his hand. The video playing on the screen changes across the sequence: it begins with a gray background and the logo "hotstar", transitions to an aerial shot of a desolate landscape with the caption "No matter how hard he tries to defeat death.", and finally shows clips of a battle scene featuring elephants and soldiers with shields.
